title: EFL Area Definition
description: Schema for area content definitions. Areas are activated at runtime when the player enters a host FoM room.

id.description: Unique area identifier, referenced by NPCs, resources, warps, and events.

backend.description: hijacked: repopulates an existing FoM room. native: reserved for future custom room registration.

hostRoom.description: FoM room name this area is hosted in (e.g. 'room_mine_01'). Required for hijacked backend.

music.description: FoM audio asset name to play on area entry (e.g. 'mus_cave'). EFL references the asset by ID — it does not own it.

entryAnchor.description: Default player spawn position on entry, as 'x,y' grid coords.

unlockTrigger.description: Trigger ID that must evaluate true for the area to activate. Empty = always active.

saveNamespace.description: Override for EFL save namespace prefix. Defaults to EFL/<modId>/area/<id>.

entryEvent.description: CutsceneDef ID fired when the player enters this area.

exitEvent.description: CutsceneDef ID fired when the player leaves this area.
